allow: Bash(node -e "const m = require\(''./public/maps/arboria/arboria-market-town.json''\); console.log\(''Size:'', m.width, ''x'', m.height\); console.log\(''Layers:'', m.layers.map\(l => l.name\).join\('', ''\)\); console.log\(''Tileset:'', m.tilesets[0].name\); console.log\(''Objects:'', m.layers.find\(l => l.type===''objectgroup''\).objects.length\);")
